title: cephalanthera subaphylla
intro: Cephalanthera subaphylla, also known as the lesser butterfly orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cephalanthera subaphylla are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to note that further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
